commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a one-attempt prompt-hook-suppressed overflow retry in the embedded PI runner, normalizes context-window stop-reason handling, updates focused tests, and changes Google Chat/memory-core peer metadata plus the lockfile.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. Current main can still reach the terminal context_overflow return after compaction and tool-result truncation are exhausted, but this review did not run a live memory-hook overflow setup.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor proof plus maintainer decisions on prompt-hook policy semantics, branch conflicts, and unrelated dependency churn before a merge or replacement branch.
